rulings.Case Title: K. MIRANDA ET AL VS. RICHARD LEWIS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 5, 2019 line 1. PLAINTIFF K. MIRANDA, JEAN LAIR Mtn For Entry Of Judgment OFF CALENDAR, insufficient notice per CCP 1005 and CCP 1013. Amended notice of motion (superseding earlier motion filed on June 11, 2019) filed on July 2, 2019 and calendared for July 5, 2019. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: RONALD B. ROMINE VS. BLAIR ADAMS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 5, 2019 line 2. DEFENDANT BLAIR ADAMS MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD GRANTED. Counsel to prepare order. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: KAUSHIK DATTANI VS. GUILLERMINA SILVA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 5, 2019 line 3. DEFENDANT GUILLERMINA SILVA MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS DENIED. Plaintiff alleges that the operative notice was personally served, an authorized method of service. The veracity of the allegations forming the prima facie elements of a cause of action are not subject to a motion to quash (re: jurisdiction) or any other motion raising factual disputes. = (501/CFH)
